agent.name: Maw — Intent-Compiled Private DeFi Agent
agent.description: An autonomous agent that compiles natural language portfolio rules into on-chain delegation constraints, privately reasons about when to rebalance via Venice AI, and executes trades on Uniswap — with every decision auditable but no strategy ever leaked.
agent.author: neilei

capabilities.description: Parse natural language portfolio intent into structured delegation parameters with adversarial detection
Monitor on-chain portfolio balances, calculate allocation drift, and determine rebalancing needs
Execute portfolio rebalancing trades on Uniswap within delegation constraints

tools.name: Venice AI LLM
tools.description: Private AI inference with web search, structured output, and multi-model routing (qwen3-5-9b, gemini-3-flash-preview)

tools.name: Uniswap Trading API
tools.description: Quote and execute swaps with Permit2 signatures

tools.name: The Graph — Uniswap V3 Subgraph
tools.description: Query Uniswap V3 pool data (TVL, volume, fee tiers)

tools.name: MetaMask Smart Accounts Kit
tools.description: Create and sign ERC-7715 delegations with caveats, redeem via ERC-7710

tools.name: Viem — Chain Interaction
tools.description: Read balances, send transactions, sign typed data on EVM chains

tools.name: ERC-8004 Reputation Registry
tools.description: On-chain agent reputation feedback on Base

policies: All trades constrained by on-chain delegation caveats (ERC-7715/7710)
Venice AI inference with no-data-retention (private reasoning)
Budget limits enforced per-day and total via caveat enforcers
Adversarial intent detection before delegation creation
Pre-trade safety checks: budget, slippage, gas, delegation validity
